loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active and reactive energy for this month from panel members; SEC and capacity/subsidy limit are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy consumption for UPS, BPDB, and HHF feeders. Rated and Contracted energy lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating (rated_kva/rated_kw) is unknown, so no derived reference lines can be calculated.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing apparent power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) from outgoing feeders; rated capacity and worst-peak markers are omitted because this asset's nameplate rating is unknown and no windowed-peak reducer exists.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak and Feeder Demand (UPS, BPDP) — Load Factor and Critical Threshold are not measured for this asset.
